questions.question: Explain the key differences between Store-and-Forward and Cut-Through packet switching methods.
questions.hint: Describe the advantages and disadvantages of each method

questions.question: What is the purpose of packet reassembly in packet switching, and what are the advantages of reassembling packets on the destination host?
questions.hint: Consider the types of packet loss and their impact on reassembly

questions.question: Compare and contrast the advantages and disadvantages of connectionless and connection-oriented packet switching methods.
questions.hint: Discuss the implications for network reliability and flow control
